project_type: Go CLI application (Linux init system for k3OS)
build_system: Makefile with go build, golangci-lint, go test
test_framework: go test with testify/mock and testify/require (mock-based unit tests)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'go test -race -covermode=atomic -failfast ./...' to verify all tests pass. 2. Run 'golangci-lint run ./...' to verify linting passes. 3. Run 'CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o k3os .' to verify build succeeds.
setup_instructions: Go 1.24+ is pre-installed. Run 'go mod tidy' after adding dependencies.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - can download packages. Tests have linux build tag on most boot packages. No Docker daemon available for e2e tests.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TDD approach (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR). golangci-lint must pass. Minimum 80% test coverage.
key_patterns: 1. Interfaces defined in internal/iface/iface.go. 2. Implementations in internal/iface/osimpl/. 3. Mock-based testing using testify/mock in *_test.go files with dedicated mock_test.go. 4. Deps struct pattern for dependency injection (modes.Deps, finalize.Finalizer fields). 5. mode.Detector uses func fields for dependency injection. 6. All boot packages use //go:build linux tag.
directory_structure: internal/iface/ - interfaces. internal/iface/osimpl/ - real implementations. internal/boot/modes/ - boot mode handlers. internal/boot/finalize/ - boot finalization. internal/mode/ - mode detection. main.go - wires everything together.
